chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-234 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 07-03-2025 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioners. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant P.G for the State. **** Statements filed by respondents No.3&4 are taken on record. This petition has been filed in respect of harassment. However, from perusal of contents of petition, it reflects that there is civil dispute between the parties; therefore, writ petition cannot be entertained. Accordingly, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed. However, the parties are at liberty to avail the alternate remedy available under the law. JUDGE Ahmad
